trial_type.Description: Which audio type was heard by the subject in this trial.

value.Description:
The code associated with a trial type. NOTE: this is NOT the trigger
    type in EEG annotations but these are separated by 2 triggers in EEG

sample.Description: The sample within the EEG data at which an event occurred.

n_simultaneous_stimuli.Description: Number of simultaneously presented stimuli (e.g., 1 story or 1 click train).

EEG_trigger_start.Description: The trigger values in the EEG annotations for the event onset.

EEG_trigger_end.Description: The trigger values in the EEG annotations for 20 ms before event offset.

file_clicks.Description: The file loaded to play the click audio in that trial. (called 'audio' in the hdf5 dictionary).

file_story1.Description: The file played of the story 'alice'. If nothing then no file was played for that story in that trial.

file_story2.Description: The file played of the story 'peterpan'. If nothing then no file was played for that story in that trial.

file_story3.Description: The file played of the story 'pinocchio'. If nothing then no file was played for that story in that trial.

file_story4.Description: The file played of the story 'timemachine'. If nothing then no file was played for that story in that trial.

file_story5.Description: The file played of the story 'wizardofoz'. If nothing then no file was played for that story in that trial.
